headerDisplay: Send emails via iCloud SMTP when switches are triggered

username.title: iCloud email address (sender)
username.description: Use the same email address used to log in to iCloud.com when generating the app-specific password.

password.title: App-specific password
password.description: Generate an app-specific password on https://account.apple.com.

to.title: Recipient email (optional)
to.description: Email address that will receive the message. If empty, the email will be sent to the sender address (username). Multiple recipients are allowed (comma-separated emails supported, e.g. a@a.com, b@b.com).

cooldown.title: Cooldown (seconds)
cooldown.description: Minimum time between trigger events for this switch.
